---
title: "Eavesdropping and community structuring in army ant following birds"
image: "../images/card_pics/bcan_001.jpg"
description: "This work explores how species use acoustic cues to locate army-ant swarms. We find that asymmetric “eavesdropping” helps organize community structure in mixed-species foraging assemblages."
categories: ["Panama PLUMAS Project", "Animal Communication & Contest Dynamics"]
contributors: "Michael Castano, PLUMAS Team"
feature_order: "NA"
format:
  html:
    toc: FALSE
---
